# ChatIslam

AI-powered Islamic knowledge chat and dawah platform. Authentic answers sourced from Quran, Hadith, and classical scholarship.

**Live:** [chatislam.org](https://chatislam.org)

## Quick Links

- [[Getting Started]] -- set up local development
- [[Architecture]] -- how the platform is built
- [[Features]] -- feature list with status
- [[Contributing]] -- how to contribute

## About

ChatIslam provides accessible Islamic knowledge through AI-powered conversations. It serves three distinct audiences with adapted communication styles:

- **Muslim mode** -- scholarly depth with hadith citations, madhab positions, and classical references
- **New Muslim mode** -- gentle step-by-step guidance, encouraging tone, practical focus
- **Dawah mode** -- bridge-building language for non-Muslim audiences, universal concepts first

All responses are grounded in Ahl us-Sunnah wal-Jamaah methodology, sourced from the Islam.wiki knowledge base, with human escalation to vetted scholars for complex questions.
